name: revit_create_paths_of_travel
description: Creates PathOfTravel elements on a floor plan from room start points to door endpoints.

view_id.description: ViewPlan element id for path creation

room_ids.description: Room element ids for single-room modes

door_ids.description: Door instance ids as path endpoints

notes: Uses PathOfTravel.CreateMapped and CreateMultiple; near-corner points computed via AppendRoomNearCornerPoints.
